name: Spartan Corp Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: Delaware Division of Corporations (icis.corp.delaware.gov) - registered agent address only
notes: Carrier name appears truncated ('Which Will Do Bus[iness As X]'). The address 2140 S Dupont Hwy, Camden DE 19934 is the well-known registered agent address of Paracorp/Parasec (a DE entity-formation/registered-agent service). No FMCSA SAFER match for 'Spartan Corp' or 'Spartan' carriers based in Delaware. DE SOS entity search requires direct portal access and is not bulk-queryable. Likely a small shell DBA; underlying operating entity unknown. No USDOT (likely intrastate or operates under different legal name).

name: Teton Bus Svc Inc
entity_status: active (operating as Choteau Public Schools contractor)
registry_source: Choteau Acantha (local newspaper), Montana SOS biz.sosmt.gov (portal blocked)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Gary Passmore confirmed as owner of Teton Bus Service contracting with Choteau school district for route buses (Choteau Acantha article 'Choteau schools staff welcome students back'). The Choteau school board met June 3, 2024 specifically to discuss Teton Bus Service route contract. SAFER searches for 'TETON BUS', 'TETON BUS SVC', 'PASSMORE BUS', 'GARY PASSMORE' all returned zero records. Note: 'TETON PRO COMPANY' (USDOT 1255129, 4046 Highway 89 Choteau MT) exists but is a logs/lumber/building materials hauler, NOT this school bus operator. Original Summit list address (809 1st St NE, Choteau) appears outdated. Phone (406) 466 area code matches Choteau.

name: Peterson Bussing LLC
entity_status: likely dissolved/inactive (retired from bussing per local press)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records Search (apps.dfi.wi.gov) - no record found
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Per Merrill Area Public Schools Superintendent's Corner (Merrill Foto News, Sept 2021 archived), Peterson Bussing retired from the bussing business a few years prior to 2024 and the MAPS district transitioned to Kobussen Buses. Wisconsin DFI corporate records search returned ZERO records for 'PETERSON BUSSING' (any variant), and SAFER returned zero records for PETERSON BUSSING / PETERSON BUSING / PETERSON BUS SERVICE in Wisconsin. Listed as a school bus transportation service in Merrill, WI on Manta and Yellow Pages but no current corporate filings. Likely operated as small LLC, dissolved post-retirement.

name: Weston Transportation Svc
fmcsa_address: 1720 S 11th St, Prairie Du Chien, WI 53821
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; WI DFI search returned no match for 'Weston Transportation' as standalone entity
notes: The Cazenovia address (E2511 County Road S #A, Cazenovia WI 53924) is a satellite terminal of SOUTHWEST BUS SERVICES INC (USDOT 540304), headquartered in Prairie du Chien, WI. Job listings for 'Bus Driver - Weston' position at Cazenovia 53924 are posted by Southwest Bus Services Inc. 'Weston' here refers to the route/district served (likely Weston School District in nearby SW Wisconsin / Richland County area), not a separate corporate entity. WI DFI returned zero results for 'Weston Transportation' in Cazenovia. SAFER returned zero results for 'Weston Transportation'. The Summit list entry appears to misattribute the satellite terminal as a separate company. Tying USDOT/MC info to parent Southwest Bus Services Inc.

name: Integrity Wheelchair
registry_source: BBB profile (Better Business Bureau, Elgin IL); Illinois SOS portal blocked (HTTP 403)
notes: Legal entity name 'Integrity Wheelchair Transport Service'. Founded 2008-05-02 per BBB. Owner: Ralph Troeger. Operating contact: Bill Mears. SAFER search returned zero records for 'INTEGRITY WHEELCHAIR', 'INTEGRITY WHEELCHAIR TRANSPORT', 'INTEGRITY WHEELCHAIR TRANSPORT SERVICE'. The address 340 Commerce Dr, Crystal Lake IL 60014 is also the HQ of A-TEC Ambulance Inc (a separate entity led by Dave Davis, CEO). No corporate parent-subsidiary relationship confirmed between Integrity Wheelchair and A-TEC; they appear to be co-located. Wheelchair/NEMT operators commonly operate intrastate-only and do not require USDOT registration. BBB profile shows '18 years in business' (as of 2026).
